MODULE: cosmos.memory.knowledge_graph_v2
FILE: cosmos/memory/knowledge_graph_v2.py (748 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Knowledge Graph v2 - Enhanced with Temporal Edges and Entity Resolution

Q1 2025 Feature: Enhanced Knowledge Graph
- Temporal edge tracking (relationships over time)
- Automated entity resolution and merging
- 3D graph visualization data support
- Relationship evolution tracking

CLASSES:
- TemporalEdge: A relationship with temporal information.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: dict) -> 'TemporalEdge'
- EntityCluster: A cluster of entities that might be the same.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- EntityResolutionCandidate: A candidate pair for entity resolution.
- TemporalQuery: Query with temporal constraints.
- KnowledgeGraphV2(KnowledgeGraph): Extended knowledge graph with temporal edges and entity resolution.

New Feature
  Methods: async def initialize(self)
  Methods: async def add_temporal_relationship(self, source: str, target: str, relation_type: str, weight: floa
  Methods: async def end_relationship(self, source: str, target: str, relation_type: str, end_time: Optional[da
  Methods: async def query_at_time(self, query: str, time_point: datetime, max_entities: int=10) -> GraphQuery
  Methods: async def get_relationship_evolution(self, source: str, target: str, relation_type: Optional[str]=No
  Methods: async def find_resolution_candidates(self, min_similarity: Optional[float]=None) -> list[EntityResol
  Methods: async def merge_entities(self, entity1_id: str, entity2_id: str, keep_id: Optional[str]=None) -> Ent
  Methods: def get_canonical_id(self, entity_id: str) -> str
